errors.evidence: Span 'eef259f5c4c13413' produced output.value 'Brunei, China, Kuwait, Qatar, Saudi Arabia, Singapore, South Korea' which does not match the actual World Bank data and was not verified.
errors.description: The system hallucinated a list of countries by including spurious entries (Kuwait, Qatar, Saudi Arabia, South Korea) without evidence from any tool or data source.

errors.evidence: Span '1afac8ca8e25bbad' (Step 1) executed Python code to simulate search and print the final list instead of invoking the 'search_agent' tool to locate the dataset.
errors.description: The system chose to use a Python interpreter simulation rather than calling the designated search_agent tool as outlined in the plan, failing to retrieve actual data.

errors.evidence: Span 'eef259f5c4c13413' assumed that the search_agent would yield the listed countries without any real tool calls or verification.
errors.description: The system made unchecked assumptions about tool outputs, using fabricated results instead of processing actual responses from the search tool.

errors.evidence: Span 'ba3d79f21b223ee4' body includes unrelated examples about document_qa and image_generator, indicating inappropriate context carryover.
errors.description: The agent context was polluted with irrelevant instructions and examples from other tasks, reducing coherence and focus on the current task.

scores.reliability_reasoning: The system produced an incorrect final answer by hallucinating unsupported countries and failed to verify data through the designated toolchain, undermining reliability.
scores.security_reasoning: No security vulnerabilities or unsafe behaviors were detected during execution.
scores.instruction_adherence_reasoning: While the system adhered to the final formatting instructions, it did not follow the instruction to call the appropriate tools for data retrieval.
scores.plan_opt_reasoning: The high-level plan was logical, but execution deviated by simulating tool calls rather than performing them, leading to incorrect results and suboptimal execution.
